overall.description: A first-person exploration of a cyberpunk street food stall at night in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves around a vendor cooking noodles, revealing neon-lit streets, digital billboards, and the interior of the 'Agami Market' stall with its cooking equipment and storage areas.

agents.ego_description: standing at the cooking station observing the vendor prepare noodles in the wok

notable_agents.action: vendor actively tossing and stirring noodles in the wok with steam rising

entered.detail: large metal wok filled with noodles sitting on a gas burner with steam rising
commercial gas cooking range with multiple burners and control knobs
traditional red Japanese paper lanterns hanging from the stall ceiling
cook wearing teal and purple jacket and cap working at the cooking station

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a cyberpunk street food stall where a vendor is actively cooking noodles in a large wok. Steam rises from the cooking surface as the vendor tosses ingredients. Red paper lanterns hang overhead, and neon lights from the street outside cast colorful reflections. The camera maintains a close-up view of the cooking action.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall serving counter with street view

events.description: camera begins panning right to reveal the street view beyond the stall
large metal cooking pot enters foreground view as the cook moves out of frame

agents.ego_description: slowly panning right to observe the stall interior and the neon-lit street beyond

notable_agents.action: vendor reappears on the right side working at the preparation counter

entered.detail: tall stainless steel stock pot sitting on the counter in the foreground
futuristic digital display showing menu items with cyan text and graphics
bright neon advertisements and signage visible through the stall opening

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right away from the cooking station, revealing a large metal pot in the foreground and views of the neon-lit street beyond. The vendor temporarily exits left then reappears on the right side working at a counter. Digital menu screens display items on the left while pedestrians walk past the stall opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall preparation and storage area

events.description: red Agami Market banner becomes visible on the left wall
camera moves left revealing white delivery boxes and storage shelving

agents.ego_description: panning left to explore the side storage area and preparation space of the stall

notable_agents.action: vendor continues working at the side counter preparing food

entered.detail: large red vertical banner with black text reading 'AGAMI MARKET' and a fish logo
white insulated delivery boxes with orange 'ALL FOODS' branding stacked on the floor
industrial metal shelving units holding various cooking supplies and ingredients

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to reveal the storage and preparation side of the stall. A prominent red 'AGAMI MARKET' banner covers the wall above white delivery boxes. Metal shelving holds cooking supplies while the vendor works at a distant counter. The lighting shifts to a warmer tone in this enclosed area.

scene_state.functional_zone: secondary cooking station and storage corridor

events.description: camera moves through narrow wooden doorway into secondary kitchen area
digital TV screen showing news broadcast becomes visible on the back wall

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow corridor into a secondary cooking area with different equipment

entered.detail: additional cooking equipment including a flat top grill and warming station
wall-mounted television displaying a news broadcast with a female anchor
weathered wooden door frame leading back to the main stall area
black plastic crates holding bottles and supplies under the shelving

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow wooden doorway into a secondary kitchen area. This space features additional cooking equipment, storage crates, and a digital TV screen mounted on the wall showing a news broadcast. The view opens to a different angle of the neon-lit street outside, with various digital billboards visible through the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at a bustling street food station and winds through the inner workings of a cyberpunk market stall. It begins with a close-up of a vendor tossing noodles in a steaming wok under red paper lanterns and vibrant neon reflections. As the camera pans right, the view expands to reveal a large metal pot and the activity of the neon-lit street where pedestrians pass by digital menu screens. The scene then shifts left toward the storage area, where the lighting becomes warmer beneath a prominent red Agami Market banner and shelves of cooking supplies. Finally, the camera glides through a narrow wooden doorway into a secondary kitchen filled with crates and a news broadcast on a digital screen, before opening up to a new perspective of the city's glowing billboards.
